project_type: Vanilla JS Canvas-based card game (Klondike Solitaire)
language: JavaScript (ES modules, browser + Node.js headless tests)
build_system: Custom Node.js build script (tools/build.mjs) using only stdlib (fs, path, zlib). Generates per-platform dist/<platform>/ and dist/<platform>.zip
test_framework: Custom Node.js test harness with assert/test pattern. Three test files: selftest.mjs (logic), domtest.mjs (module loading + file structure), sdk-probes.mjs (platform adapters). Must run with NODE_OPTIONS="" to avoid preload issue.
test_command: NODE_OPTIONS="" node tests/selftest.mjs && NODE_OPTIONS="" node tests/domtest.mjs && NODE_OPTIONS="" node tests/sdk-probes.mjs
verification_instructions: 1. Run all three test files with NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix. 2. Run build script. 3. Verify dist/ has all 5 platform directories and zips. 4. Check index.html can be served statically (relative paths, no server deps).
snapshot_or_generated_files: dist/ directory is generated by build and listed in .gitignore. Not checked in.
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Node.js v22 available. No npm packages. All code is vanilla JS with ES modules.
environment_constraints: INTEGRATIONS_ONLY network - NO npm install, NO CDN resources, NO external fonts/images/audio. Everything must be programmatically generated (Canvas API for graphics, Web Audio API for sounds). Node.js v22 stdlib only for tooling. Must run tests with NODE_OPTIONS="" prefix.
contribution_requirements: All files must work on GitHub Pages (static hosting, relative paths). All assets programmatically generated. No dead/placeholder buttons - every UI control must be functional. Cards rendered via Canvas 2D. Audio via Web Audio synthesis.
key_patterns: Canvas-based rendering (not DOM), ES module imports, class-based architecture, game loop with update/render split, platform adapter pattern for portal SDKs, custom test harness with assert/test functions, seeded RNG for daily challenges, localStorage persistence via SaveManager
directory_structure: Root: index.html, styles.css, DEPLOY.md. src/core/ (loop, input, math, render, audio). src/game/ (game, card, deck, tableau, foundation, stock, drag). src/systems/ (save-manager, progression, daily-challenge, achievements). src/ui/ (hud, screens). src/platform/ (adapter, standalone, crazygames, gamedistribution, y8, playhop, sdkUtil, index). src/config/ (scoring, themes, daily-seeds, achievements). tools/ (build.mjs). tests/ (selftest, domtest, sdk-probes).
